hero.headline: Run your mine like the world's best.
hero.sub: AI-native operating system. Tanzanian-first. Multi-tenant. Multi-lingual.

capabilities.heading: Six capabilities, one calm operator.
capabilities.sub: Each capability ties into your mine's knowledge graph and writes to an immutable audit chain.

licence.title: Licence calendar
licence.blurb: PML, ML, and SML on one calendar. 90-, 60-, 30-day expiry warnings. Aware of Tumemadini renewal workflow.

brief.title: Daily brief
brief.blurb: Every morning at 06:00 the Master Brain shows overnight actions, decisions that need you, and gold-window treasury position.

drillhole.title: Drill-hole logger
drillhole.blurb: Field logger for drill holes and grade-control. Cores photographed, assayed, linked to a pit segment, written to the chain.

treasury.title: FX & treasury
treasury.blurb: TZS · USD · gold ounces. Hedge proposals against live BoT and LBMA spot. Off-take projections by week.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.blurb: Artisanal miners, registered traders, licensed smelters. KYC for every participant. One-click off-take agreements.

compliance.title: Compliance pack
compliance.blurb: NEMC EIA, royalty returns, OSHA logs, audit chain. Ready for submission to Tumemadini and TRA.

one.label: Sign-up + KYB
one.title: Register and verify your business.
one.body: We integrate with BRELA, TRA, and Tumemadini. Full KYB inside 48 hours. No paper forms.

two.label: Import
two.title: Bring your licences and sites.
two.body: Upload PML/ML/SML licences, pit maps, drill-hole logs. Your mine's knowledge graph builds itself.

three.label: Master Brain
three.title: Master Brain takes over.
three.body: Starts in shadow mode for 14 days. You see what it would have done. Then you grant authority, step by step.

brief.heading: Your first minute at 06:00.
brief.sub: The Master Brain handled overnight operations. Here's what it did, what it flagged, and what the numbers say.

ask.heading: Ask. It answers.
ask.sub: Not a chatbot. The mine itself speaking in the first person, grounded in its knowledge graph, with clickable citations.
ask.question: What's my cash runway?
answerPlan: Query TZS balances across all bank accounts
Fetch gold inventory and live LBMA spot
ask.answer: You hold TZS 412M in cash and 184 oz of gold worth TZS 1.18B at today's spot. Trailing 4-week burn is TZS 87M/wk. That gives you 18.3 weeks of runway — or 22 weeks if the February Geita off-take settles on time.
ask.evidence: Evidence: TRA bank-feed · LBMA spot · off-take MR-241

autonomy.heading: Your pace, not ours.
autonomy.sub: Four autonomy levels. Each is clearly defined. Nothing happens without your sign-off until you say so.

levels.executeWithApproval: Acts with your approval at each step.
levels.autonomous: Acts on its own inside your policy. Red-lines still need approval.

chain.heading: Every action is cryptographically on the record.
chain.sub: Append-only log with SHA-256 prev-hash and per-entry HMAC. Tumemadini, NEMC, and auditors can verify the chain without trusting us.

pricing.heading: Clear pricing. No surprises.
pricing.sub: Five tiers. Monthly in TZS. Start free with Mwanzo. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.footnote: All prices in TZS. Payable via M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or bank transfer.

testimonial.heading: Pilot quotes available Q3 2026.
testimonial.sub: We're currently working with ten pioneer mining operators across Geita, Mererani, and Songwe. Once we have 12-week outcomes, we'll publish their words here.

footer.tagline: AI-native operating system for Tanzanian mining. Master Brain, audit chain, bilingual.

pilotPage.heading: Apply to join the pilot.
pilotPage.sub: We're selecting 20 mining operators for our 12-week pilot. No cost. Full flexibility. We'll work together to build a system that fits the Tanzanian context.
pilotPage.success: Thank you. We'll be in touch within 5 business days.
pilotPage.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email pilot@borjie.co.tz

pricingPage.heading: Build at your own pace.
pricingPage.sub: Five tiers. TZS. Mwanzo is free forever. We accept M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or bank transfer.
pricingPage.compareSub: Every tier ships every feature. The difference is quotas and support.
